user.title: Solar Irrigation — Location
user.description: Enter the geographic location and orientation of your garden.

buildings.title: Solar Irrigation — Buildings
buildings.description: Paste the JSON of buildings/obstacles. Each building: {"pts":[{"x":0,"y":0},...], "h":3.0}. Coordinates are in meters from origin. Leave [] if no obstacles.

zones.title: Solar Irrigation — Zones
zones.description: Paste the JSON of irrigation zones. Each zone must have: zone_id, name, pts (meters), and optionally: switch_entity, mm_per_min, threshold_mm, kc.

et0.title: Solar Irrigation — ET0 Source
et0.description: Select how to obtain the daily evapotranspiration value.

data.et0_entity: ET0 sensor entity or weather entity

error.invalid_json: Invalid JSON format. Please check the syntax.
